text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a letter from a fan arrives for Tosen
Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No way! A fan letter, for me?! It's like I'm already
a star!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is, like, so embarrassing. I wonder what
they wrote...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
About thirty minutes later, Tosen Jordan returns,
humming to herself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I splurged a little! New lip color, some glittery nail
polish. And what else...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, yeah! I bought so many cosmetics! I just
couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, the person who wrote the fan letter?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, like, if that's how my fans see me, then I
seriously can't slack off with my makeup!
choice_data_list:
I don't think that's what they meant by
"sparkle"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Tosen Jordan that I suspect they meant she
sparkles when she's working hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For real? And that's a thing?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Nah! I'm pretty sure they were complimenting my beat face!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you know my nails and makeup are, like,
high-key what I'm known for, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Some people say I'm too flashy, but whatever! Like I care what they say.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
This is who I am! I'll show the fans who support me
how much I really sparkle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Speaking with her head held high, Tosen Jordan
certainly does seem to be shining bright.
